title: HDFC Bank is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Senior)

jsonLd.title: HDFC Bank is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with HDFC Bank! We are hiring a Credit Analyst for our Vijayawada team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About HDFC Bank:
HDFC Bank is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Learning & development budget
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Vijayawada, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with HDFC Bank!
